summary: Deep technical audit of the 32-signal voting system across 6 modules. Found 4 bugs (2 high severity), 7 actionable recommendations, and documented the full 7-layer weighting mechanism. The system has extensive regime-adaptive infrastructure but several layers interact in ways that reduce net effectiveness — regime accuracy overlay using alltime data can un-gate recently broken signals, and static REGIME_WEIGHTS have drifted from actual regime-conditional performance.

top_signals.name: calendar
top_signals.note: Best ranging-regime performer at 87.3% (511 samples). Correctly boosted to 1.2x in ranging REGIME_WEIGHTS. Low activation rate provides genuine rarity bonus.

top_signals.name: bb
top_signals.note: Top technical signal in ranging at 69.8% (582 samples). Bollinger Band extremes are textbook mean-reversion. Correctly boosted 1.5x in ranging and 1.2x at 1d horizon.

top_signals.name: ministral
top_signals.note: Strong recent global accuracy (68.0%, 125 samples) but only 45.8% in ranging specifically. Recent boost likely from non-ranging windows. Per-ticker accuracy gating is good.

top_signals.name: qwen3
top_signals.note: Consistently above 59% across horizons. Small ranging sample (66) but promising at 56.1%.

top_signals.name: mean_reversion
top_signals.note: Star performer in ranging (62.4%) and trending-down (82.4%, 239 samples). Correctly boosted 1.5x in ranging.

top_signals.name: claude_fundamental
top_signals.note: Strong in ranging (63.1%, 5312 samples). Largest sample size of any signal in ranging. But 0 recent votes — contributes nothing to current consensus.

top_signals.name: fibonacci
top_signals.note: PARADOX: 68.2% recent (110 sam) vs 41.4% regime-ranging (1774 sam). Currently boosted to 1.6x in ranging based on recent data, but regime data contradicts. Small recent sample may be misleading.

top_signals.name: momentum
top_signals.note: Surprisingly strong in ranging at 58.9% (2196 samples). Has no special regime weight adjustment — potential untapped edge.

worst_signals.name: fear_greed
worst_signals.note: Collapsed from 58.6% alltime to 25.9% recent (170 samples). Correctly regime-gated and penalized to 0.3x. But regime overlay can un-gate it using stale 67.1% ranging data.

worst_signals.name: forecast
worst_signals.note: Below coin-flip at every horizon and every regime. Regime-gated in ranging. Consider full disablement.

worst_signals.name: macro_regime
worst_signals.note: Below coin-flip everywhere. Should be gated in trending-down too (34.5%, 1256 samples).

worst_signals.name: smart_money
worst_signals.note: BUG: 10.0% accuracy in trending-down (130 samples) but NOT regime-gated there. Strongest negative-alpha signal in the system.

worst_signals.name: econ_calendar
worst_signals.note: Phantom top-performer. 86.8% in pre-regime 'unknown' bucket inflates alltime. Fails in EVERY labeled regime. 0 recent votes.

worst_signals.name: trend
worst_signals.note: Worst ranging performer at 34.1% (615 sam). Correctly regime-gated at 1d but exempted at 3h (61.6%). Good horizon handling.

worst_signals.name: sentiment
worst_signals.note: 33.8% at 3h is actively harmful. 46.8% at 1d is noise. In macro_external correlation group — should be silenced by group leader gate.

worst_signals.name: structure
worst_signals.note: Recent collapse to 36.1%. Correctly regime-gated in ranging.

correlation_clusters.name: trend_direction (defined)
correlation_clusters.note: All fail together in ranging. Group leader (likely volume_flow by sample count) at 46.4% is below 47% group leader gate threshold — entire group should be silenced.

correlation_clusters.name: macro_external (defined)
correlation_clusters.note: Leader (sentiment 46.8%) is below 47% group gate — entire group silenced at 1d. Also individually regime-gated. Triple-gated: computationally wasteful but safe.

correlation_clusters.name: pattern_based (defined)
correlation_clusters.note: Both regime-gated in ranging _default. Correlation group is irrelevant when both are already gated.

correlation_clusters.name: low_activity_timing (defined)
correlation_clusters.note: Calendar strong (87.3% ranging). Econ_calendar broken (32.0% ranging). Low activation rate means penalty rarely applies. Grouping is correct.

correlation_clusters.name: rare_technical (defined)
correlation_clusters.note: Both weak in ranging. Both regime-gated.

correlation_clusters.name: UNDISCOVERED: llm_ensemble
correlation_clusters.current_handling: No correlation group — both get full weight
correlation_clusters.note: Both local LLM signals using same _build_llm_context. Likely moderate correlation. Should measure and potentially group.

correlation_clusters.name: UNDISCOVERED: mean_reversion_bb
correlation_clusters.current_handling: No correlation group — both get full weight
correlation_clusters.note: Both mean-reversion signals that excel in ranging. Conceptual overlap (BB%B is a sub-indicator of mean_reversion module). May be double-counting the same edge.

current_weighting_mechanism: 7-layer multiplicative weighting: (1) accuracy_weight = blended accuracy (70% recent_7d + 30% alltime, adaptive 90/10 when divergence > 15%, override by regime-specific then per-ticker accuracy), (2) regime_mult from static REGIME_WEIGHTS dict, (3) horizon_mult dynamic from cross-horizon accuracy ratios clamped [0.4,1.5], (4) activation normalization = IDF rarity * bias penalty, (5) activity rate cap 0.5x when > 70% activation, (6) correlation penalty 0.3x for non-leaders in defined groups, (7) accuracy gate at 45% threshold forces HOLD. Final consensus = BUY/SELL by total weighted vote, then 5-stage confidence penalty cascade (regime 0.75x/0.80x, volume/ADX gate, trap detection, dynamic MIN_VOTERS, unanimity penalty), followed by market health penalty, earnings gate, linear factor model confirmation, and global cap at 0.80.

accuracy_gate_analysis.mechanism: Signals below 45% accuracy (>= 30 samples) are force-HOLD. Not inverted, not dampened — removed entirely.

edge_cases.issue: Regime overlay un-gates recently broken signals
edge_cases.detail: fear_greed: blended accuracy = 0.9*0.259 + 0.1*0.586 = 0.292 (correctly gated). Regime overlay replaces with 0.671 (ranging alltime, 2817 sam) because sample >= 30. Signal is effectively un-gated despite 25.9% recent failure.

BUG-158 exempts signals with >= 60% per-ticker accuracy (50+ samples) from regime gating. This data is alltime, so historically good signals on specific tickers can bypass gating even when recently degraded.
Up to 1.5x boost on accuracy based on avg_return magnitude. A 50% accuracy signal with high avg_return gets displayed as 75% in the weighting. Conflates return magnitude with directional accuracy.

signal_weights.json has per-signal weights from multiplicative updates (eta=0.1) but they are never referenced in _weighted_consensus. Weights range from 0.01 to 4.5e+118 — numerically useless even if integrated.

rules.trending_up: EMA9-EMA21 gap >= 0.5% AND EMA9 > EMA21 AND RSI > 45
rules.trending_down: EMA9-EMA21 gap >= 0.5% AND EMA9 < EMA21 AND RSI < 55 AND close <= EMA21

issues: Ranging is the catch-all bucket — most instruments spend most time here
No multi-timeframe detection — weekly uptrend with daily range = ranging
BUG-156 patch (close > EMA21 forces ranging) shrinks trending-down window

mwu_weights_status.note: Multiplicative compounding without bounds has made these weights numerically meaningless. get_normalized_weights() exists but is never called from consensus.

discovered_bugs.title: smart_money not regime-gated in trending-down
discovered_bugs.detail: smart_money has 10.0% accuracy in trending-down (130 samples). Not in REGIME_GATED_SIGNALS['trending-down']['_default']. When trending-down activates, smart_money votes with full weight and is catastrophically wrong 90% of the time.

discovered_bugs.title: Regime accuracy overlay uses alltime data, un-gating recently broken signals
discovered_bugs.detail: signal_accuracy_by_regime() at line 697 of accuracy_stats.py loads ALL entries without recency filter. When generate_signal() uses this at line 1440-1442 to override blended accuracy, it replaces correctly-gated recent data with stale alltime regime data. Example: fear_greed blended = 29.2% (gated), regime overlay = 67.1% (un-gated).
discovered_bugs.fix: Create signal_accuracy_by_regime_recent(horizon, days=30) and prefer it over alltime regime data when sample >= 30

discovered_bugs.title: econ_calendar phantom top-performer
discovered_bugs.detail: econ_calendar: 86.8% in 'unknown' regime (pre-regime-detection data), but 32.0% ranging, 15.4% trending-up, 1.3% trending-down. All positive accuracy from historical data without regime labels. 0 recent votes. Could damage consensus if it starts voting again.
discovered_bugs.fix: Add to DISABLED_SIGNALS or gate across all regimes

discovered_bugs.title: fibonacci REGIME_WEIGHTS 1.6x contradicts regime data
discovered_bugs.detail: REGIME_WEIGHTS['ranging']['fibonacci'] = 1.6 based on 68.2% recent global. But ranging-specific accuracy = 41.4% (1774 samples). The 1.6x boost is based on the wrong data.
discovered_bugs.fix: Reduce to 0.6x or make REGIME_WEIGHTS dynamic from regime accuracy cache

recommendations.title: Add recent-window filter to regime-specific accuracy overlay
recommendations.description: Create signal_accuracy_by_regime_recent(horizon, days=30) and use it to prevent stale alltime regime data from un-gating recently broken signals. Highest-impact single fix.
recommendations.implementation: 1. Add function to accuracy_stats.py (copy signal_accuracy_by_regime with since= parameter). 2. In generate_signal(), load regime_acc_recent and prefer it when samples >= 30. 3. Add caching with '_recent' suffix.

recommendations.title: Fix smart_money trending-down regime gate
recommendations.description: Add 'smart_money' and 'oscillators' to REGIME_GATED_SIGNALS['trending-down']['_default']. smart_money is 10.0% accurate in trending-down.
recommendations.implementation: Update frozenset at line 213 of signal_engine.py

recommendations.title: Make REGIME_WEIGHTS data-driven from regime accuracy cache
recommendations.description: Replace static dict with dynamic computation: weight = min(1.6, max(0.3, regime_accuracy / 0.50)). Eliminates manual tuning drift (fibonacci 1.6x vs 41.4% actual).
recommendations.implementation: Add _compute_dynamic_regime_weights() with 1h cache TTL, fallback to static dict.

recommendations.title: Disable or fully gate econ_calendar
recommendations.description: Fails in every labeled regime (32.0%/15.4%/1.3%). Add to DISABLED_SIGNALS until investigated.

recommendations.title: Add LLM ensemble correlation group
recommendations.description: Group ministral and qwen3. Both use same context builder and likely have moderate correlation. Let higher-accuracy one dominate.

recommendations.title: Boost momentum in ranging REGIME_WEIGHTS
recommendations.description: momentum has 58.9% accuracy in ranging (2196 samples) but no regime weight boost. Add momentum: 1.2 to REGIME_WEIGHTS['ranging'].

recommendations.title: Clean up MWU weights system
recommendations.description: signal_weights.py is dead code — weights are never used in consensus. Either remove entirely or integrate with caps and renormalization.

system_strengths: Comprehensive multi-layer defense: 7 weight factors + 5-stage confidence cascade + regime gating
Per-ticker accuracy override (BUG-158) captures ticker-specific alpha
Adaptive recency blend (70/30 normal, 90/10 divergent) responds to regime shifts
Horizon-aware regime gating correctly allows trend at 3h while gating at 1d
Correlation group leader gating at 47% silences entire broken groups
Dynamic MIN_VOTERS (5 ranging vs 3 trending) prevents marginal consensus
Unanimity penalty correctly discounts overconfident consensus
system_weaknesses: Regime accuracy overlay uses alltime data — creates loophole un-gating broken signals
Static REGIME_WEIGHTS drift from actual data (fibonacci 1.6x vs 41.4% regime accuracy)
MWU weight system is dead code producing no value
No measured signal correlation — CORRELATION_GROUPS defined by manual inspection
The 'unknown' regime bucket inflates alltime accuracy for pre-regime signals
Utility boost conflates return magnitude with directional accuracy
Triple-gating of same signals (regime gate + accuracy gate + correlation gate) is computationally wasteful
files_analyzed: portfolio/signal_engine.py (1638 lines — core voting engine, regime weights, confidence penalties)
portfolio/accuracy_stats.py (~1200 lines — accuracy tracking, blending, regime-conditional, per-ticker)
portfolio/signal_registry.py (141 lines — plugin registration for 22 enhanced signals)
portfolio/signal_weights.py (~120 lines — MWU weight manager, unused)
portfolio/short_horizon.py (3h/4h horizon caps and slow signal gating)
data/regime_accuracy_cache.json (per-regime accuracy: unknown, ranging, trending-up, trending-down)
